headlines.title: NASA’s Psyche Mission Captures Mars During Gravity Assist Approach
headlines.summary: Description This colorized image of Mars was captured by NASA’s Psyche mission on May 3, 2026, about 3 million miles (4.8 million kilometers) from the planet. The spacecraft is approaching the planet for a gravity assist
